decision.observation_summary: Storefront shows three products and a cart panel that says 'Your cart is empty.' Yet an order summary appears below with 'Order ord_a0a42543 - Total charged: $12.50'.
decision.reason: Test whether Checkout creates another order even though the cart is currently empty.
decision.reasoning: The sidebar shows an empty cart but also a prior order with a charge. To confirm any inconsistency, I will click Checkout again while the cart is empty to see if another order is created, which would indicate checkout is allowed without items.
